calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Flury appeared via zoom for Celia Chan (petitioner).
Christopher Jew appeared in person for and with Renee Woo (objector).

Discussion was held regarding the status of the petitioner no being a US resident, that she is residing in Taiwan, and that the residence in Monrovia, California is the residence of her brother.

The Petition before the Court is ordered denied without prejudice.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.
